language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language used in Kitliva.
language.description: Unsupported phone languages use English as fallback.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your Kitliva preferences.
settings.languageSubtitle: English or Finnish now, more later.
settings.accountSubtitle: More account controls are coming later.

explore.title: Explore gear
explore.aiHelper: AI will turn this into smarter search filters.
explore.aiEmptyError: Write what you are looking for first.
explore.aiUnavailable: AI search is unavailable. Showing regular results.
explore.aiFallback: AI used a lightweight fallback. Showing interpreted results.
explore.aiFallbackTextOnly: AI search used your text as a smarter search query.

sheet.categorySubtitle: Choose the type of gear you want to browse.
sheet.priceSubtitle: Set a budget that fits you.
sheet.conditionSubtitle: Choose how used the item can be.
sheet.locationSubtitle: Find gear by city or area.
sheet.shippingSubtitle: Choose how you want to receive gear.
sheet.newSubtitle: Unused or still in original condition.
sheet.goodSubtitle: Light normal use, ready to enjoy.
sheet.fairSubtitle: Visible use, but still works well.
sheet.cityHelper: City search is active now. Radius search can be added later.
sheet.anyDeliverySubtitle: Show all pickup and shipping options.
sheet.localPickupSubtitle: Find gear you can collect in person.
sheet.shippingAvailableSubtitle: Browse gear that can be shipped.
sheet.shippingInfo: Delivery filtering is prepared for upcoming listing delivery data.

sell.title: Sell your gear
sell.draftSavedBody: You can continue this listing later.
sell.draftErrorBody: Please try again before leaving this screen.
sell.restoreBody: You have an unfinished listing saved on this device.

photos.title: Add photos
photos.tip: Start with clear photos. The first photo becomes your cover.

details.title: Item details
details.subtitle: Help buyers understand exactly what you are selling.
details.conditionHelper: Choose the option that best matches the item.
details.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell buyers what is included, how much it has been used and why you are selling it.

pricing.title: Set your price
pricing.subtitle: Choose a fair price based on condition and similar listings.
pricing.tipBody: A clear price helps buyers make faster decisions. You can adjust it later.

delivery.title: Delivery and location
delivery.subtitle: Tell buyers where the item is and how they can get it.

review.title: Review your listing
review.subtitle: Check the details before publishing.
review.safeBody: Keep conversations in Kitliva and agree pickup or shipping details clearly with the buyer.

success.title: Listing published
success.subtitle: Your gear is now live and ready to be discovered by nearby buyers.
success.nextFind: Buyers can now find your listing
success.nextReady: Keep your gear ready for pickup or shipping

errors.titleRequired: Please add a title before continuing.
errors.categoryRequired: Please choose a category before continuing.
errors.conditionRequired: Please choose the item condition before continuing.
errors.descriptionRequired: Please add a short description before continuing.
errors.priceRequired: Please add a price before continuing.
errors.priceInvalid: Please enter a valid price before continuing.
errors.cityRequired: Please add a city before continuing.
errors.countryRequired: Please add a country before continuing.
errors.deliveryRequired: Please choose at least one delivery option.
errors.publishNoPhoto: Your listing was not published. Please check your connection and try again.
